title: DevOps Engineering Program — Your Complete Career Path
body: Start your DevOps journey with our comprehensive 12-week program covering everything from Linux to Kubernetes, CI/CD, cloud platforms, and monitoring.
highlights: Linux, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Terraform & more
cta: 🎯 Limited seats available — don't miss out!

title: Linux Administration I — Master the Foundation
body: Every DevOps engineer starts with Linux. Learn system administration, shell scripting, networking, package management, and server hardening in 6 hands-on weeks.
highlights: Perfect for beginners — no prior experience needed

title: Linux Administration II — Go Beyond the Basics
body: Take your Linux skills to the next level. Advanced storage, performance tuning, security hardening, automation, and enterprise Linux management.

title: Docker & Containers — Build, Ship, Run Anywhere
body: Master containerization with Docker. Learn to build images, manage containers, create multi-service applications with Docker Compose, and prepare for production deployments.

title: Kubernetes (K8s) — Orchestrate at Scale
body: Learn Kubernetes from pods to production. Deploy, scale, and manage containerized applications across clusters with the industry's #1 orchestration platform.

title: Jenkins — Automate Your CI/CD Pipeline
body: Build powerful CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins. Automate builds, tests, and deployments with the most popular automation server in DevOps.
highlights: Integration with Docker, Git & cloud platforms

title: GitHub Actions — CI/CD Built Into GitHub
body: Build, test, and deploy directly from GitHub. Learn workflows, custom actions, matrix builds, and cloud deployments with the fastest-growing CI/CD platform.
highlights: Deploy to AWS, Azure & GCP from GitHub

title: GitLab CI/CD — Complete DevOps in One Platform
body: Master GitLab's built-in CI/CD. From .gitlab-ci.yml to production — pipelines, runners, environments, and auto-deployment all in one platform.

title: ArgoCD & GitOps — Declarative Continuous Delivery
body: Implement GitOps with ArgoCD. Manage Kubernetes deployments declaratively using Git as the single source of truth for your infrastructure.
cta: 🔶 GitOps is the future — start now!

title: AWS Cloud — The World's Leading Cloud Platform
body: Master Amazon Web Services. Learn EC2, S3, VPC, IAM, RDS, Lambda, EKS, and more. Prepare for AWS Solutions Architect certification.
highlights: Core services: EC2, S3, VPC, IAM, RDS
cta: ☁️ Start your cloud career with AWS!

title: Microsoft Azure — Enterprise Cloud Platform
body: Master Azure cloud services. Learn compute, networking, AKS, Azure DevOps, and identity management. Prepare for AZ-900 certification.

title: Google Cloud Platform — Cloud Built for Innovation
body: Learn GCP from infrastructure to data. GCE, GKE, Cloud Functions, networking, IAM, and BigQuery — powered by Google's global infrastructure.
highlights: GCE, GKE & Cloud Run for containers

title: Terraform — Infrastructure as Code for Any Cloud
body: Write, plan, and provision infrastructure across AWS, Azure, GCP, and more with Terraform. Learn HCL, modules, state management, and multi-cloud deployments.

title: Ansible — Automate Server Configuration at Scale
body: Master configuration management with Ansible. Automate server setup, application deployment, and infrastructure management with simple YAML playbooks.

title: Git — Version Control Fundamentals & Workflows
body: Master Git from scratch. Branching strategies, merge workflows, rebasing, cherry-picking, and team collaboration — the foundation of every DevOps workflow.
cta: 📝 Every engineer needs Git — start now!

title: DevSecOps — Shift Left and Secure Your Pipeline
body: Integrate security into every stage of your DevOps pipeline. SAST, DAST, container scanning, secrets management, and compliance automation.
cta: 🔐 Secure your pipeline — security is everyone's job!

title: Prometheus — Cloud-Native Monitoring
body: Master Prometheus monitoring. PromQL queries, alerting rules, service discovery, exporters, and integration with Grafana for production-grade observability.

title: Grafana — Dashboards & Alerting That Actually Work
body: Build beautiful, actionable dashboards with Grafana. Connect to Prometheus, Elasticsearch, CloudWatch, and more. Create alerts that wake you up only when it matters.

title: ELK Stack — Centralized Logging at Scale
body: Master the ELK Stack. Collect, parse, search, and visualize logs from all your applications and infrastructure with Elasticsearch, Logstash, and Kibana.
cta: 🔍 When metrics aren't enough, logs tell the full story!

title: Zabbix — Enterprise Monitoring That Scales
body: Master Zabbix, the enterprise-grade monitoring platform. Monitor servers, network devices, applications, and cloud infrastructure with automated discovery and intelligent alerting.

title: DevOps Academy Egypt — Learn From Industry Experts
body: 24+ hands-on courses covering the complete DevOps ecosystem. From Linux fundamentals to Kubernetes, multi-cloud, CI/CD, monitoring, and security — everything you need to launch your DevOps career.
highlights: Flexible schedule — learn at your pace

title: DevOps Engineers Are in High Demand — Are You Ready?
body: The average DevOps engineer salary keeps rising. Companies are hiring faster than engineers are graduating. Don't wait — build the skills that employers are looking for right now.
highlights: DevOps is the #1 in-demand tech skill
Build a portfolio of real projects
Join a community of DevOps professionals
cta: 💼 Invest in your future — enroll today!

title: Why DevOps Academy Egypt?
body: We don't just teach theory — every course is built around real-world projects. You'll deploy actual applications, build CI/CD pipelines, configure monitoring stacks, and manage cloud infrastructure. When you finish, you have a portfolio, not just a certificate.
highlights: Small class sizes for personalized attention

title: Master the Complete Monitoring Stack
body: Prometheus + Grafana + ELK + Zabbix — our monitoring track covers every tool you need to build enterprise-grade observability. Know what's happening in your infrastructure before your users do.

title: CI/CD Track — Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI & ArgoCD
body: Build automated pipelines with the industry's top CI/CD tools. From traditional Jenkins to modern GitOps with ArgoCD — master them all and automate your entire delivery process.

title: Multi-Cloud Track — AWS, Azure, GCP & More
body: Don't lock yourself into one cloud. Learn AWS, Azure, GCP, Oracle Cloud, and Alibaba Cloud. Understand the differences, pick the right tools, and become a multi-cloud architect.

title: Containers Track — Docker + Kubernetes
body: Docker for building and shipping. Kubernetes for running at scale. Together they're the foundation of modern infrastructure. Master both in our containers track.
cta: 📦 Containers are the future — be ready!

title: GitHub — Platform & Collaboration
body: More than just repositories. Learn GitHub's full platform — Projects, Actions, Packages, Pages, security features, and team collaboration workflows used by millions of developers worldwide.

title: GitLab — The Complete DevOps Platform
body: One platform from code to production. Learn GitLab's repositories, merge requests, CI/CD, container registry, package registry, Pages, and enterprise administration.
cta: 🦊 All of DevOps in one platform!
